fields.tag_line: Premium handcrafted cookies delivered with warmth, elegance, and delight.
fields.meta_title: Nest & Whisk | Premium Artisan Cookie Gifting
fields.meta_description: Small-batch artisan cookies, curated gifting boxes, subscriptions, and custom cookie assortments from Nest & Whisk.
fields.announcement_bar_text: Free nationwide shipping on curated gift boxes over Γé╣2,500.
fields.footer_blurb: Nest & Whisk blends the comfort of home baking with the elegance of handcrafted gifting. Every box is baked in small batches, wrapped beautifully, and meant to feel like a small celebration.

fields.hero_title: Delivered with warmth, elegance, and delight.
fields.hero_body: Thoughtfully baked in small batches, beautifully packed for gifting, and made to turn ordinary moments into something worth savoring.
fields.feature_one_body: Buttery centers, caramel notes, and a delicate salt finish that feels instantly gift-worthy.
fields.feature_two_body: A softly floral, elegant cookie with toasted pistachio crunch and a refined finish.
fields.feature_banner_body: Luxury packaging, personal gift notes, and recurring boxes that arrive with bakery-fresh polish.
fields.quality_body_left: Premium chocolate, cultured butter, fragrant vanilla, and thoughtful finishing touches in every box.
fields.quality_body_right: Build-your-own assortments, subscription rituals, and polished gifting moments crafted to feel personal.

fields.title: Shipping Policy
fields.summary: Delivery windows, packaging standards, and transit timing.
fields.body: We bake to order in small batches and dispatch most curated boxes within two business days. Seasonal drops and custom orders may require additional lead time, and tracking details are sent as soon as each parcel leaves our studio.

fields.title: Refund Policy
fields.summary: How Nest & Whisk handles quality concerns and damaged deliveries.
fields.body: Because our cookies are handcrafted and perishable, refunds are handled case by case. If your order arrives damaged or below standard, contact us within 48 hours and our team will make it right with a replacement, credit, or refund where appropriate.

fields.title: Privacy Policy
fields.summary: How we handle customer information and store communications.
fields.body: We collect only the information needed to fulfill orders, personalize gifting, and send opted-in marketing communications. Customer data is never sold, and account preferences can be updated or removed upon request.

fields.title: Terms & Conditions
fields.summary: Ordering, fulfillment, and website usage terms.
fields.body: By placing an order with Nest & Whisk, you agree to our fulfillment timelines, ingredient disclosures, and limited liability for circumstances outside normal shipping control. We reserve the right to update product assortments, pricing, and promotional terms as needed.

fields.question: How fresh are your cookies when they arrive?
fields.answer: Every Nest & Whisk order is baked in small batches and packed shortly before dispatch so your cookies arrive fresh, fragrant, and ready to enjoy.

fields.question: Can I choose my own flavors in a gift box?
fields.answer: Yes. Our build-a-box experience lets you choose your box size, curate the flavor mix, and include a gift message before checkout.

fields.question: Do you offer recurring subscription boxes?
fields.answer: We offer weekly, biweekly, and monthly plans with flexible renewal timing and customer-controlled flavor preferences.

fields.question: Do you handle corporate gifting and event orders?
fields.answer: Absolutely. We can help with client gifting, event favors, and larger custom assortments with polished packaging and delivery coordination.

fields.question: Do your cookies contain allergens?
fields.answer: Many of our cookies contain wheat, dairy, and eggs, and some flavors include nuts. Each product page includes ingredients and allergen notes for easy review.

fields.quote: The packaging felt as thoughtful as the cookies themselves ΓÇö polished, warm, and impossibly delicious.
We sent Nest & Whisk boxes to our top clients and every single one reached out to ask where they could order more.
It feels like receiving a small celebration at my door. The seasonal flavors are especially memorable.

fields.page_title: WeΓÇÖd love to help you plan something delicious.
fields.intro: Questions about gifting, events, custom assortments, or recurring cookie deliveries? Our studio team is here to help.
fields.contact_card_body: Tell us what youΓÇÖre celebrating and weΓÇÖll guide you toward a thoughtful cookie moment that feels beautifully personal.

fields.title: How to build a cookie gift box that feels deeply personal
fields.excerpt: A few thoughtful choicesΓÇöflavor balance, packaging tone, and a small handwritten noteΓÇöcan turn a sweet box into a memorable gift.
fields.body:
A beautiful gift box starts with intention. Begin by choosing a mix of familiar comfort and one unexpected flavor, then think about who you're sending it to and the mood you want the delivery to create.

For thank-yous, we love a balance of classic chocolate chip, sea salt caramel, and one elegant wildcard like Pistachio Rose. For celebrations, brighter profiles like Birthday Sprinkle or Red Velvet Crumble feel joyful without losing polish.

Packaging matters just as much. Ribbon-ready wrapping, a warm card, and a small note written with specificity can make the moment feel generous before the box is even opened.
fields.seo_title: How to build a personal cookie gift box | Nest & Whisk Journal
fields.seo_description: A Nest & Whisk gifting guide to building a premium cookie box that feels personal and memorable.

fields.title: Why small-batch baking changes the entire cookie experience
fields.excerpt: From ingredient quality to texture and finishing, small-batch baking gives artisan cookies their warmth, nuance, and consistency.
fields.body:
Small-batch baking creates room for precision. Dough can rest properly, chocolate can be folded in thoughtfully, and each tray can be baked for the finish we wantΓÇögolden edges, tender centers, and a fragrance that feels unmistakably bakery-fresh.

At Nest & Whisk, we think that kind of care is visible. It shows up in the shape of the cookie, the balance of salt, and the way every box feels intentionally assembled rather than mass produced.
fields.seo_title: Why small-batch baking matters | Nest & Whisk Journal
fields.seo_description: Learn why small-batch baking creates a more premium artisan cookie experience.

fields.title: Hosting notes: styling a cozy table around pumpkin spice season
fields.excerpt: A few tactile detailsΓÇölinen napkins, candlelight, warm ceramics, and softly spiced cookiesΓÇöcreate an effortless autumn table.
fields.body:
Seasonal hosting doesn't need to feel elaborate to feel beautiful. Start with warm neutrals, one textured floral or branch arrangement, and a serving plate that lets your cookies feel central.

Pumpkin Spice works especially well beside caramel tones, soft cream ceramics, and coffee-based pairings. Add one polished dessert fork, a linen napkin, and a handwritten place card and the whole moment feels elevated.
fields.seo_title: Hosting with pumpkin spice season | Nest & Whisk Journal
fields.seo_description: Cozy entertaining inspiration built around Nest & Whisk seasonal pumpkin spice cookies.

fields.title: Premium cookie gifting for clients, teams, and memorable moments.
fields.intro: From elevated client gifts to launch-day thank-yous and team celebrations, Nest & Whisk creates artisan cookie experiences that feel polished, warm, and unmistakably premium.
fields.capability_body: Curated assortments, seasonal gifting, personalized notes, premium packaging, and delivery timing planned around launches, milestones, and hosted events.
fields.lead_time_body: Most briefs can be reviewed within one to two business days, with larger or highly customized requests scoped on a more tailored timeline.
fields.consultation_body: Our gifting team pairs boutique hospitality with editorial presentation, so every touchpoint feels thoughtful from the first inquiry through final delivery.

fields.gifting_goal: A premium year-end thank-you that feels warm and design-forward.
fields.notes: Interested in a polished neutral palette, ribbon-ready wrapping, and a short printed note tucked inside every box.
